name: kicad-wasm-tests
description: Playwright tests for wxWidgets WASM and KiCad

scripts.test: npm run test:wx && npm run test:asyncify:firefox
scripts.test:pcbnew:firefox: npm run setup:kicad && playwright test --config=playwright-kicad.config.ts --project=firefox kicad/pcbnew.spec.ts
scripts.test:pcbnew:chrome: npm run setup:kicad && playwright test --config=playwright-kicad.config.ts --project=chromium --headed kicad/pcbnew.spec.ts
scripts.test:eeschema:firefox: npm run setup:kicad && playwright test --config=playwright-kicad.config.ts --project=firefox kicad/eeschema.spec.ts
scripts.test:eeschema:chrome: npm run setup:kicad && playwright test --config=playwright-kicad.config.ts --project=chromium --headed kicad/eeschema.spec.ts
scripts.test:calculator:firefox: npm run setup:kicad && playwright test --config=playwright-kicad.config.ts --project=firefox kicad/calculator.spec.ts
scripts.test:calculator:chrome: npm run setup:kicad && playwright test --config=playwright-kicad.config.ts --project=chromium --headed kicad/calculator.spec.ts
scripts.test:symbol_editor:firefox: npm run setup:kicad && playwright test --config=playwright-kicad.config.ts --project=firefox kicad/symbol_editor.spec.ts
scripts.test:symbol_editor:chrome: npm run setup:kicad && playwright test --config=playwright-kicad.config.ts --project=chromium --headed kicad/symbol_editor.spec.ts
scripts.test:gerbview:firefox: npm run setup:kicad && playwright test --config=playwright-kicad.config.ts --project=firefox kicad/gerbview.spec.ts
scripts.test:gerbview:chrome: npm run setup:kicad && playwright test --config=playwright-kicad.config.ts --project=chromium --headed kicad/gerbview.spec.ts
scripts.test:asyncify:all: npm run test:asyncify:firefox && npm run test:asyncify:safari && npm run test:asyncify:chrome
